channel.title: Zaproxy on Nabil Kara — CTF Writeups
channel.description: Recent content in Zaproxy on Nabil Kara — CTF Writeups

item.title: CSTI ZAP Active Scan Rule
item.description:
This post describes an active scan rule I implemented for OWASP ZAP to detect Command String/Template Injection (CSTI) patterns. I cover the motivation, detection heuristics, rule implementation, and examples of tuning it for low false positives.

Content coming soon — edit this file to add your writeup, code snippets, and examples.
